mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pii_flag (node_id, status, types, detected_at, requested_by, requested_at, request_reason, decided_by, decided_at, decision_reason) VALUES (#{nodeId}, #{status}, #{types}, #{detectedAt}, #{requestedBy}, #{requestedAt}, #{requestReason}, #{decidedBy}, #{decidedAt}, #{decisionReason})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM pii_flag WHERE node_id IN #{i}
mapper.select: SELECT f.node_id, f.status, f.types, f.detected_at, f.requested_by, f.requested_at, f.request_reason, f.decided_by, f.decided_at, f.decision_reason FROM pii_flag f JOIN node n ON n.id = f.node_id WHERE n.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT f.node_id AS nodeId, n.name AS title, n.updated_by AS updatedBy, f.types AS types, f.status AS status, f.detected_at AS detectedAt FROM pii_flag f JOIN node n ON n.id = f.node_id WHERE n.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY f.detected_at DESC

SELECT f.node_id AS nodeId, n.name AS title, n.updated_by AS updatedBy, f.types AS types, f.requested_by AS requestedBy, f.requested_at AS requestedAt, f.request_reason AS requestReason FROM pii_flag f JOIN node n ON n.id = f.node_id WHERE n.deleted_at IS NULL AND f.status = 'requested' ORDER BY f.requested_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pii_notice (node_id, recipient, kind, message, sent_by, sent_at, ack_at) VALUES (#{nodeId}, #{recipient}, #{kind}, #{message}, #{sentBy}, #{sentAt}, #{ackAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM pii_notice WHERE node_id IN #{i}
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM pii_notice WHERE node_id=#{nodeId} AND recipient=#{recipient} AND kind=#{kind} AND ack_at IS NULL ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE pii_notice SET message=#{message}, sent_at=#{sentAt} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS id, p.node_id AS noteId, n.name AS noteTitle, p.kind AS kind, p.message AS message FROM pii_notice p JOIN node n ON n.id = p.node_id WHERE p.recipient=#{recipient} AND p.ack_at IS NULL ORDER BY p.id
